The '''TIE fighter boat''' was an aquatic superiority variant of the original [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]]. This specialized TIE fighter had been designed to operate underwater<ref name="BFTGS">''[[Battle for the Golden Sun]]''</ref> but was able to participate in surface assaults.<ref name="OEB" />

==Characteristics==
These aquatic assault craft had the classic TIE [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]], although it was elongated and was based on the [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]]. It was [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by two crewmembers (one pilot and one gunner), often [[aquatic assault stormtrooper]]s.<ref name="OEB" />

The lower half of the solar panels were "bent" to form runners for the craft as it skimmed the water's surface. The upper half of the solar panels had been removed for improved visibility.<ref name="OEB" />

==History==
The TIE fighter boats were often assigned to [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Imperial Aquatic Garrison|aquatic garrisons]] where they operated as aquatic assault and patrol vehicles. TIE fighter boats also worked together with [[Aquatic Terrain Armored Transport|AT-AT swimmers]] and [[aquatic assault stormtrooper]]s in deep water assaults.<ref name="BFTGS" />

The [[MFB-4 Mobile Repulsor Base]] deployed on [[Alluuvia]] carried many TIE fighter boats.<ref name="OEB" />

==Appearances==
*[[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']]
*''[[Battle for the Golden Sun]]'' {{1st}}
